params.name: Golden Autumn
params.description:
On Mar 18, 1896 AD, Golden Autumn made its debut and was exhibited to the public for the first time.
Golden Autumn is a renowned masterpiece by the Russian artist Levitan. With confident brushstrokes, the painter depicts fields, streams, and birch forests during the autumn season. Through vibrant and lively colors, the golden hues are highlighted, creating a sense of freshness and ethereal beauty. This not only showcases the artist's exceptional skills but also captivates the viewers, immersi …
